channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Listen to SZA Cover the Goo Goo Doll’s “Iris”
item.description: 🎤 Dive into this epic cover! SZA brings a fresh vibe to "Iris" by the Goo Goo Dolls. 🌟 #NewMusicDiscovery

item.title: 100 Gecs’ Dylan Brady Shares New Solo EP, Yeat & Kylie Jenner Collab
item.description: 🚀 Dylan Brady of 100 Gecs drops solo EP ft. Yeat & Kylie Jenner collab! Get ready to vibe with this unexpected trio! 🎶✨ #MusicNews

item.title: See Wet Leg Serve as Musical Guest on ‘SNL UK’ Premiere Episode
item.description: 🎶 Catch Wet Leg bringing the grooves on the premiere episode of 'SNL UK'! 🇬🇧🎤 #WetLeg #SNLUKPremiere

item.title: Bob Dylan Kicks Off 2026 Tour With Surprise Eddie Cochran Cover, New Acoustic Set
item.description: 🎸 Bob Dylan surprises fans with an Eddie Cochran cover and all-new acoustic set on 2026 tour! 🎶 #BobDylan #LiveMusicFun

item.title: Watch Wet Leg Play The First SNL UK
item.description: 🌟 Cue the confetti! 🎉 Wet Leg is taking over SNL UK for the first time ever! 🇬🇧🎶 #WetLeg #SNLUK
